    accumulateGravity(AttackAction.LunarReactionType, CombatSimulator) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Columbina
    Increments the Gravity counter by 20 for the given reaction type and triggers an Interference attack when the counter reaches Columbina.MAX_GRAVITY.

    Owns cooldown gating and dispatch for typed character actions.

    appliesToCharacter(Character) - クラスのメソッド mechanics.buff.Buff
    Returns true if this buff applies to the given character.
    apply(StatsContainer, double) - クラスのメソッド mechanics.buff.Buff
    Applies this buff's stat bonuses to stats if currentTime falls within the active window [startTime, expirationTime).
    applyA1PassiveIfSwirled(CombatSimulator) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Sucrose
    Applies the Catalyst Conversion (A1) passive: if the enemy currently has a Pyro, Hydro, Electro, or Cryo aura, grants +50 EM to all party members of the matching element for 8 s.
    applyA4Passive(CombatSimulator) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Sucrose
    Applies the Mollis Favonius (A4) passive: grants all party members except Sucrose herself 20% of Sucrose's current EM as flat EM for 8 s.
    applyAscendantBlessing(Character) - クラスのメソッド simulation.CombatSimulator
    Collaborator-facing helper for Moonsign-specific follow-up policy.
    applyAscendantBlessing(Character) - クラスのメソッド simulation.runtime.MoonsignManager
    Applies Moonsign: Ascendant Blessing when an eligible non-Lunar character performs a Skill or Burst while Ascendant Gleam is active.
    applyAscendantBlessingIfNeeded(Character, AttackAction) - クラスのメソッド simulation.runtime.ActionTimelineExecutor
     
    applyC1MoonsignEffect(AttackAction.LunarReactionType, CombatSimulator) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Columbina
    Applies the C1 Moonsign: Ascendant Gleam bonus triggered on Gravity Interference.
    applyC2MoonsignEffect(AttackAction.LunarReactionType, CombatSimulator) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Columbina
    Applies the C2 Moonsign: Ascendant Gleam bonus triggered when Lunar Brilliance is already active at the time of a subsequent Gravity Interference.
    applyC6Buff(CombatSimulator, Element, double) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Sucrose
    Applies the C6 elemental DMG bonus (+20%) to all party members for the absorbed element for the specified duration.
    applyExpectedNormalAttackEnergy(Character) - クラスのメソッド simulation.runtime.CombatActionResolver
     
    applyFieldBuff(Buff) - クラスのメソッド simulation.CombatSimulator
    Adds an active-character-only field buff.
    applyFieldBuff(Buff) - クラスのメソッド simulation.runtime.BuffManager
    Adds a field-only buff that applies only to the active character.
    applyPassive(StatsContainer) - クラスのメソッド model.artifact.EmblemOfSeveredFate
     
    applyPassive(StatsContainer) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Bennett
     
    applyPassive(StatsContainer) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Columbina
    No static passive stat modifications for Columbina (handled dynamically).
    applyPassive(StatsContainer) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Flins
    Applies the Whispering Flame passive: grants EM equal to 8% of total ATK (capped at 160) and LUNAR_UNIQUE_BONUS +20%.
    applyPassive(StatsContainer) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Ineffa
    No static passive stat modifications for Ineffa; reaction modifiers and team buffs are applied on action.
    applyPassive(StatsContainer) - クラスのメソッド model.character.RaidenShogun
     
    applyPassive(StatsContainer) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Sucrose
    No static passive stat modifications for Sucrose.

    Applies the constant +12% All Elemental DMG Bonus.
    applyPassive(StatsContainer, double) - クラスのメソッド model.weapon.Deathmatch
     
    applyPassive(StatsContainer, double) - クラスのメソッド model.weapon.DragonsBane
     
    applyPassive(StatsContainer, double) - クラスのメソッド model.weapon.NocturnesCurtainCall
    Applies the constant +10% Max HP bonus from the weapon passive.
    applyPassive(StatsContainer, double) - クラスのメソッド model.weapon.PrimordialJadeWingedSpear
    Stack bonuses (+3.2% ATK per stack, +12% All DMG at 7 stacks) are applied via the "Eagle Spear of Justice" Buff registered in PrimordialJadeWingedSpear.onDamage(Character, AttackAction, double, CombatSimulator), ensuring visibility in the Active Buffs report.

    ARTIFACT_STAT_ORDER - クラスのstatic変数 visualization.ReportHtmlRenderer
     
    ArtifactOptimizer - mechanics.optimizationのクラス
    Generates a simulated artifact stat block following the KQM Standard (KQMS) substat methodology.
    ArtifactOptimizer() - クラスのコンストラクタ mechanics.optimization.ArtifactOptimizer
     
    ArtifactOptimizer.OptimizationConfig - mechanics.optimizationのクラス
    Configuration passed to ArtifactOptimizer.generate(ArtifactOptimizer.OptimizationConfig, StatsContainer, StatsContainer, StatsContainer) to control which main stats and substat allocation strategy to use.
    ArtifactOptimizer.OptimizationResult - mechanics.optimizationのクラス
    Container for the artifact stats and the liquid roll allocation produced by ArtifactOptimizer.generate(ArtifactOptimizer.OptimizationConfig, StatsContainer, StatsContainer, StatsContainer).

    CRIT_DMG - 列挙クラスの列挙型定数 model.type.StatType
    Crit DMG as a decimal (e.g. 0.50 = 50 %).
    CRIT_DMG - クラスのstatic変数 model.standards.KQMSConstants
    Average Crit DMG substat value per roll (6.62 %).
    CRIT_RATE - 列挙クラスの列挙型定数 model.type.StatType
    Crit rate as a decimal (e.g. 0.05 = 5 %).
    CRIT_RATE - クラスのstatic変数 model.standards.KQMSConstants
    Average Crit Rate substat value per roll (3.31 %).
    CRYO - 列挙クラスの列挙型定数 model.type.Element
    Cryo element; maps to StatType.CRYO_DMG_BONUS.
    CRYO_DMG_BONUS - 列挙クラスの列挙型定数 model.type.StatType
    Cryo DMG Bonus%, also the resistance map key for Cryo RES.
    CRYO_RES_SHRED - 列挙クラスの列挙型定数 model.type.StatType
    Cryo-specific RES Shred%.

    Average flat DEF substat value per roll.

    getDisplayName() - 列挙クラスのメソッド model.type.CharacterId
     
    getDominantReactionType() - クラスのメソッド model.character.Columbina
    Returns the Lunar reaction type that has accumulated the most Gravity, or "Lunar-Charged" as the default when no Gravity has accumulated.
    getDps(double) - インタフェースのメソッド simulation.DamageTracker
    Computes DPS using the currently accumulated total and the given rotation time.
    getDps(double) - クラスのメソッド simulation.runtime.DamageReport
    Computes DPS from the currently accumulated total and the provided rotation time.

    Returns total DPS over the recorded rotation time.

    Returns the fixed dummy attacker for Template B, preferring partyOrder[0] when possible.

    Returns the burst energy cost (60).

    Returns the Thundercloud expiry time.
    getTotal(StatType, StatsContainer...) - クラスのstaticメソッド mechanics.optimization.ArtifactOptimizer
    Sums the value of type across all provided StatsContainers, skipping null containers.
    getTotalAtk() - クラスのメソッド model.stats.StatsContainer
    Computes and returns the final ATK value using the standard Genshin formula: BASE_ATK * (1 + ATK_PERCENT) + ATK_FLAT.
    getTotalDamage() - クラスのメソッド simulation.CombatSimulator
    Returns total accumulated damage.
    getTotalDamage() - インタフェースのメソッド simulation.DamageTracker
    Returns the total accumulated damage across all sources.
    getTotalDamage() - クラスのメソッド simulation.runtime.DamageReport
    Returns the cumulative total damage recorded so far.
    getTotalDef() - クラスのメソッド model.stats.StatsContainer
    Computes and returns the final DEF value: BASE_DEF * (1 + DEF_PERCENT) + DEF_FLAT.
    getTotalEnergyGained() - クラスのメソッド model.entity.Character
     
    getTotalEnergyGained() - クラスのメソッド model.entity.state.EnergyState
     
    getTotalFlatEnergy() - クラスのメソッド model.entity.Character
     
    getTotalFlatEnergy() - クラスのメソッド model.entity.state.EnergyState
     
    getTotalHp() - クラスのメソッド model.stats.StatsContainer
    Computes and returns the final HP value: BASE_HP * (1 + HP_PERCENT) + HP_FLAT.
    getTotalParticleEnergy() - クラスのメソッド model.entity.Character
     
    getTotalParticleEnergy() - クラスのメソッド model.entity.state.EnergyState

    Returns the total resistance shred applicable to the given element.
    getTotalScaledParticleEnergy() - クラスのメソッド model.entity.Character
    Returns total particle energy received after ER scaling.
    getTotalScaledParticleEnergy() - クラスのメソッド model.entity.state.EnergyState
    Returns total particle energy received after ER scaling (i.e. what was actually added to the energy bar from particles, excluding flat energy and burst reset).

    HEALING_BONUS - 列挙クラスの列挙型定数 model.type.StatType
    Outgoing healing bonus%.
    hidden - クラスの変数 mechanics.rl.RecurrentState
     
    hitCount - クラスの変数 mechanics.element.ICDManager.ICDState
    Number of hits counted since the last successful element application.
    hp - クラスの変数 visualization.ReportViewAdapter.ReportCharacterStats
     
    HP_BASE - クラスのstatic変数 model.weapon.NocturnesCurtainCall
     
    HP_FLAT - 列挙クラスの列挙型定数 model.type.StatType
    Flat HP bonus added after percent scaling.
    HP_FLAT - クラスのstatic変数 model.standards.KQMSConstants
    Average flat HP substat value per roll.
    HP_PERCENT - 列挙クラスの列挙型定数 model.type.StatType
    Additive HP percent bonus (e.g. from HP% sands).
    HP_PERCENT - クラスのstatic変数 model.standards.KQMSConstants
    Average HP% substat value per roll (4.96 %).
    HP_WINE - クラスのstatic変数 model.weapon.NocturnesCurtainCall
     
    HtmlReportGenerator - visualizationのクラス
    Public entry point for generating interactive HTML simulation reports.
    HtmlReportGenerator() - クラスのコンストラクタ visualization.HtmlReportGenerator
     
    HYDRO - 列挙クラスの列挙型定数 model.type.Element
    Hydro element; maps to StatType.HYDRO_DMG_BONUS.
    HYDRO_DMG_BONUS - 列挙クラスの列挙型定数 model.type.StatType
    Hydro DMG Bonus%, also the resistance map key for Hydro RES.
    HYDRO_RES_SHRED - 列挙クラスの列挙型定数 model.type.StatType
    Hydro-specific RES Shred%.
    HYPERBLOOM - 列挙クラスの列挙型定数 mechanics.reaction.ReactionResult.Kind
     

    I

    icdManager - クラスの変数 simulation.CombatSimulator
     
    ICDManager - mechanics.elementのクラス
    Tracks Internal Cooldown (ICD) state per character per skill group to determine whether an elemental hit actually applies an element to the enemy.
    ICDManager() - クラスのコンストラクタ mechanics.element.ICDManager
     
    ICDManager.ICDState - mechanics.elementのクラス
    Mutable ICD tracking state for one (character, tag) group.
    ICDState() - クラスのコンストラクタ mechanics.element.ICDManager.ICDState
     
    icdTag - クラスの変数 simulation.action.AttackAction
     
    ICDTag - model.typeの列挙クラス
    Labels the ICD group that an elemental application belongs to.
    ICDTag() - 列挙クラスのコンストラクタ model.type.ICDTag
     
    icdType - クラスの変数 simulation.action.AttackAction
     
    ICDType - model.typeの列挙クラス
    Defines the Internal Cooldown (ICD) behaviour for an elemental application.
    ICDType() - 列挙クラスのコンストラクタ model.type.ICDType

    The fixed interval in seconds between successive ticks.

    isBurstActive(double) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Bennett
     
    isBurstActive(double) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Flins
    Returns false; Flins has no persistent burst state tracked by the base class.
    isBurstActive(double) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Ineffa
    Returns false; Ineffa's burst is instant / summon-based with no persistent active state.
    isBurstActive(double) - クラスのメソッド model.character.RaidenShogun
     
    isBurstActive(double) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Sucrose
    Returns true while the burst field is active.
    isBurstActive(double) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Xiangling
     
    isBurstActive(double) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Xingqiu
     
    isBurstActive(double) - インタフェースのメソッド model.entity.BurstStateProvider
     
    isBurstActive(Character, double) - クラスのメソッド mechanics.optimization.RotationSearcher.RunnableEvaluation
     
    isBurstActive(Character, double) - クラスのメソッド mechanics.rl.ObservationEncoder
     
    isCountsAsBurstDmg() - クラスのメソッド simulation.action.AttackAction
    Returns whether this action is classified as Burst damage for bonus interactions.
    isCountsAsSkillDmg() - クラスのメソッド simulation.action.AttackAction
    Returns whether this action is classified as Skill damage for bonus interactions.
    isEcTimerRunning() - クラスのメソッド simulation.runtime.ReactionState
    Returns whether an EC-related timer is active.
    isEcTimerRunning() - クラスのメソッド simulation.runtime.ReactionStateController
    Returns whether an EC-related timer is active.
    isECTimerRunning() - クラスのメソッド simulation.CombatSimulator
    Compatibility wrapper retained for existing reaction helpers.
    isElectroCharged() - クラスのメソッド mechanics.reaction.ReactionResult
     
    isExpired(double) - クラスのメソッド mechanics.buff.Buff
    Returns true if this buff has expired at the given simulation time.
    isFinished(double) - クラスのメソッド simulation.event.PeriodicDamageEvent
    Returns true when the current simulation time has reached or passed the end of this event's duration (startTime + duration).
    isFinished(double) - クラスのメソッド simulation.event.SimpleTimerEvent
    Returns true once SimpleTimerEvent.finish() has been called.
    isFinished(double) - インタフェースのメソッド simulation.event.TimerEvent
    Returns whether this event has completed and should be removed from the queue.
    isLoggingEnabled() - クラスのメソッド simulation.CombatSimulator
    Returns whether console logging is enabled.
    isLunarCharacter() - クラスのメソッド model.character.Columbina
    Returns true; Columbina is a Lunar character and benefits from Lunar synergy buffs and the LUNAR_MULTIPLIER final multiplier.
    isLunarCharacter() - クラスのメソッド model.character.Flins
    Returns true; Flins is a Lunar character and benefits from Lunar synergy buffs.
    isLunarCharacter() - クラスのメソッド model.character.Ineffa
    Returns true; Ineffa is a Lunar character and benefits from Lunar synergy buffs.
    isLunarCharacter() - クラスのメソッド model.entity.Character
     
    isLunarConsidered - クラスの変数 simulation.action.AttackAction
     
    isLunarConsidered() - クラスのメソッド simulation.action.AttackAction
    Returns whether this action is considered part of the Lunar damage system.
    isLunarReaction() - クラスのメソッド mechanics.reaction.ReactionResult
     
    isManifestFlameActive(double) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Flins
    Returns true if Manifest Flame form is currently active.
    isRepeatedSwap(int, int) - クラスのメソッド mechanics.rl.RewardFunction
     
    isSwap() - 列挙クラスのメソッド mechanics.rl.RLAction

    onAction(Character, AttackAction, double) - インタフェースのメソッド simulation.ActionListener

    onAction(Character, CharacterActionRequest, CombatSimulator) - インタフェースのメソッド model.entity.ActionTriggeredWeaponEffect
     
    onAction(Character, CharacterActionRequest, CombatSimulator) - クラスのメソッド model.weapon.AmenomaKageuchi
     
    onAction(Character, CharacterActionRequest, CombatSimulator) - クラスのメソッド model.weapon.CalamityQueller
    On Elemental Skill use: Resets CalamityQueller.accumulatedStacks to 0 and increments the generation counter. Registers a "Consummation" Buff on the owner character (replacing any existing one) so it appears in the Active Buffs report. Registers a 1 s SimpleTimerEvent that increments stacks by CalamityQueller.ON_FIELD_GAIN or CalamityQueller.OFF_FIELD_GAIN each tick.
    onAction(Character, CharacterActionRequest, CombatSimulator) - クラスのメソッド model.weapon.ProspectorShovel
    Caches the simulator reference on first action for Moonsign checks.

    Registers the weapon as a CombatSimulator.ReactionListener on the first action the wielder performs.

    onDamage(Character, AttackAction, double, CombatSimulator) - クラスのメソッド model.weapon.NocturnesCurtainCall
    Fires the energy recovery and Bountiful Sea's Sacred Wine buff when the equipped character inflicts Lunar Reaction DMG.
    onDamage(Character, AttackAction, double, CombatSimulator) - クラスのメソッド model.weapon.PrimordialJadeWingedSpear
    On each damage instance: If the gap since the last hit is ≥ 6 s, all stacks are reset to 0. If the 0.3 s stack-gain cooldown has elapsed and stacks are below max, gain 1 stack. Re-registers the "Eagle Spear of Justice" Buff on the owner character with a refreshed 6 s expiration window so it appears in the Active Buffs report.
    onDamage(Character, AttackAction, double, CombatSimulator) - クラスのメソッド model.weapon.SkywardSpine
     
    onDamage(Character, AttackAction, double, CombatSimulator) - クラスのメソッド model.weapon.SunnyMorningSleepIn
    Applies the Skill EM +96 (9 s) or Burst EM +32 (30 s) buff when the wielder's Elemental Skill or Burst hits an opponent.
    onDamage(Character, AttackAction, double, CombatSimulator) - クラスのメソッド model.weapon.WolfFang

    Invoked when elemental particles are generated during the simulation.
    onReaction(ReactionResult, Character, double, CombatSimulator) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Columbina
    Handles reaction events to accumulate Gravity and Dew stacks.
    onReaction(ReactionResult, Character, double, CombatSimulator) - クラスのメソッド model.character.Flins
    C1 — Part the Veil of Snow: when any party member triggers a Lunar-Charged reaction, Flins recovers 8 Elemental Energy.
    onReaction(ReactionResult, Character, double, CombatSimulator) - クラスのメソッド model.weapon.SunnyMorningSleepIn
    Applies the Swirl EM +120 buff for 6 s when the wielder triggers a Swirl reaction.

    RotationSearcher - mechanics.optimizationのクラス
    Finds the highest-damage rotation by exhaustively evaluating all combinations of character order permutations and named action profiles.
    RotationSearcher() - クラスのコンストラクタ mechanics.optimization.RotationSearcher
     
    RotationSearcher.RotationPlan - mechanics.optimizationのクラス
    The result of a single rotation evaluation: the character cast order, the action profile chosen for each character, and the total damage dealt.
    RotationSearcher.RunnableEvaluation - mechanics.optimizationのクラス
    Encapsulates a single (order, profiles) combination to be evaluated in the parallel stream.
    rotationTime - クラスの変数 simulation.runtime.SimulationClock
     
    rotationTime - クラスの変数 visualization.ReportData
     
    run(BiFunction, Consumer, Map) - クラスのstaticメソッド mechanics.optimization.OptimizerPipeline
    Runs the full optimization pipeline: Phase 1 – ER calibration via iterative rotation simulation. Phase 2 – DPS hill-climbing with ER rolls pre-reserved per character.
    runAll() - クラスのメソッド mechanics.rl.CapabilityProfiler
    Runs all templates for every character in EpisodeConfig.partyOrder.
    RunnableEvaluation(Supplier, List, Map) - クラスのコンストラクタ mechanics.optimization.RotationSearcher.RunnableEvaluation

    RunnerStepResult - mechanics.rl.bridgeのクラス
    Batched environment step response returned by the rollout service.
    RunnerStepResult(double[][], double[][], double[], boolean[], boolean[], double[], double[], double[], double[], int[], int[], int[], int[]) - クラスのコンストラクタ mechanics.rl.bridge.RunnerStepResult
     
    runQuietly(CapabilityProfiler.TemplateRun) - クラスのメソッド mechanics.rl.CapabilityProfiler
     
    runTemplateA(CharacterId) - クラスのメソッド mechanics.rl.CapabilityProfiler
    Template A: subject on field for full episode, uses skill/burst whenever available.
    runTemplateB(CharacterId, CharacterId) - クラスのメソッド mechanics.rl.CapabilityProfiler
    Template B: subject uses skill+burst at t=0, swaps off.
    runTemplateC(CharacterId, CharacterId) - クラスのメソッド mechanics.rl.CapabilityProfiler
    Template C: subject uses skill+burst at t=0, then primary attacks for a full 20-second window.
    runTemplateD(CharacterId) - クラスのメソッド mechanics.rl.CapabilityProfiler
    Template D: same as C but subject does nothing.
    runTemplateE(CharacterId) - クラスのメソッド mechanics.rl.CapabilityProfiler
    Template E: subject on field for full episode, uses burst at t=0, then ATTACKs only.
    runTemplateF(CharacterId) - クラスのメソッド mechanics.rl.CapabilityProfiler
    Template F: subject on field for full episode, never uses burst, only skill+attack.
    runTemplateG(CharacterId) - クラスのメソッド mechanics.rl.CapabilityProfiler
    Template G: subject uses skill once (from fresh sim with 0 energy), then idles 5s.

    Enters Manifest Flame form for 10 s without dealing damage.

    Casts Northland Spearstorm: a single Electro Skill hit that activates the 6 s Thunderous Symphony state and sets the next allowed cast time.

    Standard - 列挙クラスの列挙型定数 model.type.ICDType
    Standard Genshin ICD rule: element is applied on the 1st hit of a group, then suppressed until either 2.5 seconds have elapsed or 3 hits in the same ICD group have been recorded, whichever comes first.

    tick(CombatSimulator) - クラスのメソッド simulation.event.PeriodicDamageEvent
    Executes the tick action via CombatSimulator.performActionWithoutTimeAdvance(String, AttackAction), then invokes the optional callback, and advances PeriodicDamageEvent.nextTickTime by the interval.
    tick(CombatSimulator) - クラスのメソッド simulation.event.SimpleTimerEvent
    Delegates to SimpleTimerEvent.onTick(CombatSimulator) and then advances SimpleTimerEvent.nextTickTime by SimpleTimerEvent.interval if the event has not been finished.
    tick(CombatSimulator) - インタフェースのメソッド simulation.event.TimerEvent
    Executes the event's logic at the current simulation time.

    writeMatrix(DataOutputStream, double[][]) - クラスのメソッド mechanics.rl.bridge.RolloutService
     
    writeReset(DataOutputStream, VectorizedEnvironment.RunnerResetResult) - クラスのメソッド mechanics.rl.bridge.RolloutService
     
    writeStep(DataOutputStream, RunnerStepResult) - クラスのメソッド mechanics.rl.bridge.RolloutService
     
    writeString(DataOutputStream, String) - クラスのメソッド mechanics.rl.bridge.RolloutService
     
    writeVector(DataOutputStream, double[]) - クラスのメソッド mechanics.rl.bridge.RolloutService
